_comment: Adapter registry for TheOrc fine-tuned models. All adapters must be registered here before being used in ModelProfiles.cs.

status_values.candidate: Adapter is being trained or has not yet been evaluated
status_values.approved: Eval passed; safe to activate in ModelProfiles.cs
status_values.rejected: Eval failed or regression detected; do not use
status_values.deprecated: Replaced by a newer adapter; kept for audit

activation_requirements: registered in this file with eval_status = 'approved'
before/after eval scorecard saved to evals/scorecards/
ModelProfiles.cs entry created with measured BossScore (not estimated)
no hallucination regression vs base model
